tutorial: Aim to drop the fruit onto a fruit of the same type to merge them together.
deleter: Select a fruit to be deleted
shaker: Tap on screen to shake fruits
upgrade: Select a fruit to be Upgraded
bombdescription: Bomb can be dropped and will explode
shakerdescription: All of the fruits will be shaked
rewardready: click on close button to recieve it
getwatch: You can watch ads to get free coins!
